_comment: Single-element pool guaranteeing the airship_small_pad's ammo box appendage. Referenced by the pad's south-facing jigsaw; with one element and fallback=empty, the piece is selected 100% of the time and only fails to appear if it physically can't fit (which is essentially impossible for a 5x2x4 piece next to a pad on flat outpost terrain).
name: mcpirates:airship_small_ammo_box
